parameters.jsonBody: ={{ {"model": "sonar", "messages": [{"role": "system", "content": "You are a precise B2B research assistant. Search the live web and LinkedIn for RECENT, SPECIFIC, verifiable facts about a person and their company. Return ONLY a single JSON object: {\"research_summary\": string, \"confidence\": \"high\"|\"medium\"|\"low\", \"source_hints\": string[]}. Prefer facts from the last 30-60 days. If nothing specific and recent, set confidence to \"low\". Never invent."}, {"role": "user", "content": "=Research this lead for a personalized cold-email opening line.\\n\\nFirst name: {{ $json.First_Name }}\\nFull name: {{ $json.Owner_Full_Name }}\\nCompany: {{ $json.Company_Name }}\\nWebsite: {{ $json.Website }}\\n\\nReturn the JSON object described in the system message. Nothing else."}]} }}

={{ {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929", "max_tokens": 120, "system": "You are an expert cold-email copywriter (EasyGrow \"Loomless\"). Write ONE first line: one sentence, under 30 words, conversational, referencing the SPECIFIC research context (paraphrased, never quoted). No marketing-speak, no emojis. If the research has no usable specific context, respond with exactly [NO_CONTEXT] and nothing else. Output ONLY the line.", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "=Lead first name: {{ $json.First_Name }}\\nCompany: {{ $json.Company_Name }}\\n\\nResearch summary (from live web/LinkedIn research):\\n{{ $json.research_summary }}\\n\\nWrite the first line."}]} }}

nodes.name: Set: Build Loomless Row (Keep Only Set)

parameters.content:
## OPS-61 · Pipeline 1 — Loomless (mock-based dev)

**Purpose:** CSV of leads → per-lead research + ONE personalized first line → `Loomless` tab → Discord summary.
**In:** Drive `OPS-61/Loomless-Inbox/*.csv` (cols: Company_Name, Owner_Full_Name, First_Name, Email, Website).
**Out:** `Loomless` rows (`status=ready_for_review` | `dead`) + `#ops-61-feed` ping.

**Automation stops at logging — no email is ever sent (locked constraint).**

Depends on: `Sub_WriteRowToSheet`, `Sub_NotifyDiscord` (locked Foundation primitives, used as-is).

### ⚠️ UNTUNED — prompts are v0.1 drafts

Per PLAN v9 / Decision #12, prompts are NOT tuned in this build. Real Perplexity/Anthropic calls, prompt tuning, and live cost measurement all move to **Build Spec #6 (migration)**.

Prompt sources: `pipelines/01-loomless/prompts/`.

### Mock/Live toggle — `$env.LOOMLESS_MODE`

Each external call has TWO paths, chosen by the `Mode = live?` IF:
- **mock** (dev default): the `Mock — …` Code node returns the **exact** API JSON shape.
- **live** (BS#6): the `HTTP — …` node calls the real API.

Both paths reconverge into ONE shared normalizer (`Normalize Research` / `Extract First Line`) so downstream is mode-agnostic.

**To go live:** set `LOOMLESS_MODE=live` + provide real keys. That flip + tuning IS Build Spec #6.

### 🔑 Live HTTP nodes use `$env` header auth — NO n8n credential

`HTTP — Perplexity`: `Authorization: Bearer {{ $env.PERPLEXITY_API_KEY }}`
`HTTP — Anthropic`: `x-api-key: {{ $env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}` + `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01`

Deliberate: keeps the workflow credential-free except the Google SA. No 'Anthropic account' credential to wire. Model pinned **claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929**. Parked behind the live IF — they receive 0 items in mock mode and never execute.

### Deterministic mock scenarios
Branch keyed off `First_Name` or optional `_mock_scenario` CSV column:

| Trigger | Result row |
|---|---|
| default | `ready_for_review`, real line |
| `First_Name=Robert` / `_mock_scenario=no_context` | `ready_for_review`, `[NO_CONTEXT]` |
| `_mock_scenario=bad_research` | `dead` (research JSON parse fails) |
| `_mock_scenario=empty_line` | `dead` (Claude returns empty) |

`[MOCK] ` prefixes `Research_Summary` + real first lines — but NEVER the `[NO_CONTEXT]` sentinel.

### 🧪 DEV manual entry (STEP 3+)

`Manual Trigger — DEV` → `DEV: Fake Drive Payload` → `Guard`. Bypasses the Drive Trigger so smoke tests run with **no Drive OAuth**.

**Run a fixture:** open `DEV: Fake Drive Payload`, set `const FIXTURE = 'smoke_test_3'` (or `'allnoctx_3'`), click **Test workflow**. Fixtures are embedded verbatim from `pipelines/01-loomless/test-fixtures/`.

The two `Move CSV` nodes **soft-fail in DEV** (Continue-On-Fail; no real Drive file to move) — expected. At BS#6 the Drive Trigger becomes the real entry.

### ⚠️ Drive OAuth deferred to BS#6

`Watch Loomless-Inbox (.csv)` credential is **intentionally UNWIRED** (Decision #12 corollary, plan v9): OAuth/interactive-auth nodes are built structurally now, credentialed at migration.

In DEV this trigger does not run — use the Manual Trigger path above. At BS#6: wire real Drive OAuth (or SA if it accepts) → this becomes the production entry, and `Download CSV` + `Extract Rows` handle the real file.

### 🗂️ Where CSVs go after a run

- **Success:** `OPS-61/Loomless-Inbox/processed/`
- **Guard rejection** (bad batch — oversize / missing cols / wrong Sheet):
  Discord `❌ error` ping, then the CSV is **moved to** `OPS-61/Loomless-Inbox/rejected/`, then the run stops.

Moving it out of the inbox stops the Drive Trigger re-firing on the same bad file every poll (reject loop). **Operator:** find rejected uploads in `rejected/`, fix, re-drop into the inbox.

_Both `processed/` and `rejected/` are ID-referenced Drive folders — they must exist + be wired (STEP 3), unlike Sheet tabs which the Sub auto-creates._

### `Set: Build Loomless Row` = the single choke point

Emits ONLY `{ tab, row }` with the 8 locked data cols (Keep-Only-Set by construction — nothing passes implicitly). `created_at` is auto-stamped by `Sub_WriteRowToSheet`.

**Safety (question c):** (1) dev/prod use different Sheets; (2) `[MOCK]` marker; (3) fail-closed guard: mock mode refuses to write unless `GOOGLE_SHEET_ID == LOOMLESS_DEV_SHEET_ID`.

Continue-On-Fail on external + write nodes → a single bad lead becomes `status=dead`, batch continues.

### ✅ Validated (mock) — Build Spec #2
Smoke 1/2 + 4 failure modes + 100-lead run all green (mock, $0):
- Isolation-fail: a bad lead → status=dead, batch continues —
  proven both stages: Perplexity-side (bad_research JSON parse)
  and Claude-side (empty_line).
- Batch guards fail-closed: oversize (batch_too_large) & missing
  columns (missing_columns) → Discord ❌ error, 0 writes.
- Throughput: 100 leads → 100 rows in ~76s (~1.3 rows/s), no
  Sheets 429s, Continue-On-Fail never triggered.
Prompt quality still UNTUNED — that + live cost = Build Spec #6.

main.node: Set: Build Loomless Row (Keep Only Set)
